name: Meta Template M0
description: A minimal, game-agnostic project skeleton that defines the universal structure required for a playable Phaser game. Does not assume any genre, physics regime, or gameplay mechanic.

provides: Scene flow (Preloader → TitleScreen → Levels → UI overlays)
Shared utilities (initScale, safeAddSound, addCollider, addOverlap, initUIDom)

extension.description: Minimal extension interfaces for game-type specialization

BaseGameScene.ts.purpose: Scene lifecycle skeleton with Template Method pattern

BaseEntity.ts.purpose: Minimal entity base with lifecycle hooks

_TemplateScene.ts.purpose: COPY to create new game scenes

_TemplateEntity.ts.purpose: COPY to create new entity types

extensionPoints.name: setupWorld
extensionPoints.description: World construction — tilemap, grid, arena, UI panels

extensionPoints.name: createEntities
extensionPoints.description: Entity creation — player, enemies, NPCs, towers, cards

extensionPoints.name: gameConfig.json
extensionPoints.description: Game-specific config fields added via { value: X } wrapper format
